summary: Frontend testing completed for NASSAQ Users Management infinite loop bug fix. All 5 features verified working correctly: page stability (no infinite refresh), users display (50 users), filters work without causing loops, create user button works, statistics display correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: UsersManagement.jsx - Fix correctly implemented: teacherRequests removed from fetchUsers dependencies (line 240)
UsersManagement.jsx - Initial fetch useEffect has empty dependency array [] (lines 268-273)
UsersManagement.jsx - Filter changes useEffect uses useRef to skip first render (lines 276-283)
Page displays 50 users with correct statistics and all action buttons working
context_for_next_testing_agent: Infinite loop bug in Users Management page has been fixed. The fix involved: 1) Removing teacherRequests from fetchUsers dependencies, 2) Separating initial fetch useEffect from filter changes useEffect, 3) Using useRef to skip first render in filter changes useEffect. All features working correctly.

1_no_infinite_loop.description: Users Management page does not do infinite refresh
verified: Page URL remains stable at /admin/users for 5+ seconds
Console shows no infinite loop warnings
Page content remains stable without flickering

2_users_display_correctly.description: 50 users display correctly on the page
verified: Each card shows: name, email, role badge, status badge
Action buttons present: عرض, تعليق, تعديل, حذف, إشعار

3_filters_work_correctly.description: Filters work without causing infinite refresh
verified: Account type filter (جميع الحسابات) dropdown works
Page remains stable after filter change
No repeated API calls after filter change

4_create_user_button_works.description: Create user button opens wizard correctly
verified: Clicking button opens 'إنشاء حساب مستخدم جديد' wizard

bug_fix_verification.original_issue: Infinite loop in Users Management page causing repeated page refresh
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: teacherRequests was in fetchUsers useCallback dependencies, causing fetchUsers to be recreated every time teacherRequests changed, leading to infinite loop
fix_applied: Separated initial fetch useEffect (lines 268-273) from filter changes useEffect (lines 277-283)
Used useRef (isFirstRender) to skip fetchUsers on first render in filter changes useEffect
